title: Textbook / Hypnosis / Waking Up / Skipping Stones
overview: While sharing a textbook with Takagi after forgetting his own, Nishikata foolishly tries to pull off a word-prank.

title: Ice / Appearance / Bangs / Valentine's Day
overview: With Valentine's Day upon them, Nishikata tries to hide the fact that he's hoping to get some chocolate from Takagi, but she sees right through him.

title: April Fools' Day / Blossom Watching / Forms of Address / New School Year
overview: Nishikata tries to pull off a few pranks against Takagi on April Fools' Day, but she asks for a day free of tricks between them.

title: Arm Wrestling / Grown-Up / Bitter Taste / Bicycle
overview: After easily defeating his classmates in arm wrestling, things don't go quite as well for Nishikata when Takagi challenges him to a match after class.

title: Questions / Eyebrows / After School / Happy Birthday / Sneeze
overview: It's Nishikata's birthday! While on his way to buy his own cake for some reason, he runs into Takagi.

title: Revenge / Dodgeball / Buy and Eat / Date
overview: When Nishikata and Takagi go to the snack shop hungry, they end up buying more than they planned. Then, their classmate shows up.

title: Camping Trip
overview: While at camp, Nishikata hears that if you're holding hands with someone you like at the end of a folk dance, they'll like you back.

title: Storage Closet / Nurse's Office / Lottery
overview: While cleaning up in the gym storage unit with Takagi, Nishikata pretends the door won't open, only to find that they really are locked in.

title: Made You Look / Talents / Worries / Messages
overview: Nishikata wants to surprise Takagi with a handmade surprise, but something seems to be going on with her. Later, he spots her bike at the shrine.

title: Eye Drops / Scoop / Hide and Seek / Treasure Hunting
overview: On their way home from school, Nishikata and Takagi find what looks like a treasure map. They decide to follow it.

title: Steps / Fireworks / Souvenirs / Promises
overview: One day during summer vacation, a confident Nishikata pretends to run into Takagi accidentally: he's prepared what he thinks is a fail-proof prank.

title: Summer Festival
overview: Nishikata and Takagi are mistaken for a couple on their way to the summer festival. Nishikata can't deny it fast enough, but then they get separated.
